sentences.text: Hello. Thank you for calling please listen closely. As our menu items have changed. Pressing the accounting department press four for the I T department press five for the Randall charitable trust press six for human resources press seven for payroll press eight for all other calls, please press zero and an operator will be with you shortly to hear this list again press pound.
